The '''''Invincible''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was the leader of the [[Task force/Legends|task force]] that conducted [[Operation Strike Fear]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==History==
The [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] learned about the ship while mustering in the [[Dellalt system/Legends|Dellalt system]] and was identified by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] reconnaissance mission flown by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] in a lone [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearhead]].

The ''Invincible'' was initially charged with the [[Battle of Brigia (Galactic Civil War)|destruction]] of the [[Brigia Rebel base|Rebel base]] on [[Brigia/Legends|Brigia]]. It arrived to find the Rebels in the process of evacuating but was able to inflict heavy losses on Rebel forces although the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] escaped.

Later, the ''Invincible'' was awaiting reinforcements and resupplies, ahead of an attack on [[Rudrig/Legends|Rudrig]], when a Rebel force arrived and attacked the incoming [[Juno (freighter group)|convoy]]. The ''Invincible'' launched [[TIE series/Legends|TIEs]] but they were unable to reach the Rebels in time to prevent the destruction of the convoy. The loss of the supplies disrupted the operation for several weeks.

[[File:InvincibleHangar.jpg|thumb|left|Rebel agents deliver the bomb to the ''Invincible''.]]

When the Alliance held a [[Diplomatic Summit at Sullust|diplomatic meeting]] with the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]] near [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], the ''Invincible'' disrupted the meeting and launched fighters. [[Hamo Blastwell]] and Keyan Farlander, flying R-22 Spearheads, held off the Imperial fighters until the meeting was concluded and all ships fled into hyperspace. The ''Invincible''{{'s}} attack, however, had been merely a diversion. While the meeting was taking place, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] kidnapped the Sullustan leader [[Sian Tevv/Legends|Sian Tevv]]. Farlander and Blastwell were called into action again to disable the shuttle that bore him to the ''Invincible'' and hold off Imperial fighters until a Rebel shuttle conducted a boarding operation and escaped into hyperspace.

Eventually, the Sullustans set up a plan with the Alliance; with captive [[Cygnus Spaceworks/Legends|Cygnus Spaceworks]] engineers, they modified a shuttle to appear to be an Imperial vessel. Rebel agents with the shuttle were able to get aboard the ''Invincible'', disguised as suppliers delivering cargo to the ship. The cargo however was armed with an Imperial nuclear warhead, stolen earlier by Rebel pilots from the freighter ''[[Gafra]]''. Just after the Rebel shuttle left, ''Invincible'' was blown to pieces thereby putting an end to Operation Strike Fear.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
